description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sandals from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned, adjustable straps and multi-directional lugs on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. Pair this with casual wear like jeans, cargo pants or shorts and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Upper Heavy cotton canvas upper for support and durability Cushioned, adjustable velcro strap at forefoot and front foot of the ankle Cushioned back strap Diagonal strap connecting the forefoot and ankle straps for snug Fit, and with perforations for ventilation Embossed branding on front and back ankle strap Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning Long grooves in the shape of the foot all along the footbed with small circular depressions near the heel for easy movement, ventilation and comfort Ergonomic design especially in the forefoot and heel for added comfort Outsole Made of lightweight Thermo Plastic Rubber (TPR) for extra durability, weather resistance and excellent abrasion resistance Multi-directional lugs with 'Y' shaped ones for 360° movement Midfoot stabilizer in the shape of the foot with horizontal grooves for extra grip and stability Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
